master_row.title: Modal Frequency Relation
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Dimensional Access Condition] Extra-dimensional modes couple at frequencies: \begin{equation} \omega_{nlm,n'l'm',m_{KK}}^2 = \omega_{nlm}^2 + \omega_{n'l'm'}^2 + \left(\frac{m_{KK}c}{R_{KK}}\right)^2 + 2\lambda_g\sqrt{\omega_{nlm}^2\omega_{n'l'm'}^2}\delta_{ll'}\delta_{mm'} \end{equation} with selection rules preserving angular momentum: \begin{equation} |l - l'| \leq 2, \quad m + m' + m_{KK} \equiv 0 \pmod{2\pi R_{KK}/\lambda_{dB}} \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_inputs: n, l, m, m_KK, c, R_KK
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Kaluza-Klein Tower Resonance’.
master_row.dictionary: Modal Frequency Relation — ω_nlm,n'l'm',m_KK^2 = ω_nlm^2 + ω_n'l'm'^2 + (fracm_KKcR_KK )^2 + 2λ_g sqrtω_nlm^2 ω_n'l'm'^2 δ_ll'δ_mm'
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\reverse_harmonics_publication.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.
